name: Lozenges or Curd Cheese Pastries
recipeIngredient: 1/2 oz Pine nuts, toasted and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll the pastry out very thin and cut it into small rectangles-- approximately 6x3 inches. You should have at least 24.
2. Bake them in a moderately hot oven (375°F) for ten minutes or till they are crisp and brown. Remove from the oven and cool on a rack.
3. Meanwhile, mix the curd cheese with the ginger or raisins, the pine nuts, and sugar and lemon juice to taste.
4. When ready to serve, sandwich together two pieces of pastry with the cheese mixture. They can be used as a dessert or as a snack.
